xpath.attribute: (report.filter_show_draft and options['all_entries']) or (report.filter_unreconciled and options['unreconciled']) or (report.filter_cash_basis and options['report_cash_basis']) or options.get('include_analytic_without_aml') or options['rounding_unit'] in (k for k, v in options['rounding_unit_names'].items() if v[1])
